Prediction: Yes

Reasoning:
The current visit record explicitly lists the diagnosis of "Pure hypercholesterolemia." According to the instructions, explicit evidence of an existing or actively managed lipid disorder is sufficient to predict a future diagnosis of "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism." Therefore, the diagnosis of pure hypercholesterolemia strongly supports the prediction that a diagnosis of "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism" will be coded in the next hospital visit.
